moments.title: Commonwealth Games in Full Swing
moments.blurb: The Glasgow 2026 Commonwealth Games, featuring elite sport and inclusive competition across four major venues, is well underway, running until August 2nd.

angles.name: Glasgow Excitement
angles.copy: The Commonwealth Games are lighting up Glasgow! What's been your favourite moment of the action so far?

angles.name: Team UK Support
angles.copy: Cheering on Team UK at the Commonwealth Games! Who are you hoping brings home the gold this week?

moments.title: The Hundred Cricket Heats Up
moments.blurb: The Hundred 2026 season continues this week with matches across the UK, including Birmingham Phoenix facing Trent Rockets today and Welsh Fire in action this weekend.

angles.name: Weekend Wickets
angles.copy: It's a big weekend for The Hundred! Who are you backing to smash it out of the park?

angles.name: Welsh Fire Focus
angles.copy: Welsh Fire are bringing the heat to The Hundred this weekend! Tune in to see if they can spark a win.

moments.title: F1 Hungarian Grand Prix Weekend
moments.blurb: Formula 1 is in Hungary this weekend with practice sessions today, qualifying on Saturday, and the main race on Sunday, July 26th.

angles.name: Start Your Engines
angles.copy: It's Hungarian Grand Prix weekend! Get ready for qualifying tomorrow and the main race Sunday. Who's taking pole?

angles.name: Race Day Excitement
angles.copy: All eyes on the Hungaroring this weekend. Will we see a new winner or a familiar face on the top step?

moments.title: Tour de France Reaches its Climax
moments.blurb: The 113th edition of the Tour de France concludes this Sunday, July 26th, finishing on the iconic Champs-Élysées in Paris.

angles.name: Final Push
angles.copy: The yellow jersey is almost home! Who do you think will be crowned champion on the Champs-Élysées this Sunday?

angles.name: Cycling Glory
angles.copy: After weeks of gruelling stages, the Tour de France reaches its thrilling conclusion this weekend. What's been your highlight?

moments.title: Love Island 2026 Grand Finale
moments.blurb: The highly anticipated Love Island 2026 finale is set to air live on Monday, July 27th at 9pm on ITV2 and ITVX, crowning this year's winning couple.

angles.name: Who Will Win?
angles.copy: It's almost time! The Love Island 2026 final is Monday. Which couple has stolen your heart and deserves to win?

angles.name: Final Countdown
angles.copy: Only a few days left until the Love Island final! What's been the most dramatic moment of the series for you?

moments.title: Latitude Festival Wraps Up
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival, celebrating its 20th anniversary with music, arts, comedy, and more at Henham Park, Suffolk, concludes this Sunday, July 26th.

angles.name: Latitude Last Day
angles.copy: Final weekend vibes at Latitude! Who's there and what's been your festival highlight?

angles.name: Suffolk Festival Fun
angles.copy: Latitude wraps up this weekend in Suffolk. What's the one act you wish you could have seen?

moments.title: Together Again Festival This Weekend
moments.blurb: The UK's biggest family-friendly music festival, Together Again, is happening this weekend from July 24-26 at Bolesworth, featuring six stages and over 100 artists.

angles.name: Family Festival Fun
angles.copy: Together Again Festival is ON this weekend! Who's heading to Bolesworth for some family-friendly music and fun?

angles.name: Weekend Escape
angles.copy: Looking for a weekend escape? Together Again Festival promises music, entertainment, and fun for all ages at Bolesworth.

moments.title: AIG Women's Open Approaches
moments.blurb: The AIG Women's Open golf championship, one of women's golf's most prestigious tournaments, returns to Royal Lytham and St Annes from July 29th to August 2nd.

angles.name: Women's Golf Major
angles.copy: The AIG Women's Open tees off next week! Who are you backing to win at Royal Lytham and St Annes?

angles.name: Lancashire Links
angles.copy: Get ready for world-class golf as the AIG Women's Open comes to Lancashire next week!

moments.title: Dua Lipa New Music Buzz
moments.blurb: With her 'Radical Optimism' album still charting, speculation is growing about Dua Lipa's potential fourth album, with hints of a late 2026 or early 2027 release.

angles.name: DL4 Anticipation
angles.copy: Dua Lipa fans, the buzz for DL4 is real! What sound are you hoping for on her next album?

angles.name: Pop Queen Reign
angles.copy: Still obsessed with 'Radical Optimism', but already dreaming of new Dua Lipa! What's your favourite track from her last album?

moments.title: Mick Jagger Turns 83
moments.blurb: Legendary Rolling Stones frontman Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday on Sunday, July 26th.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Icon
angles.copy: Happy 83rd birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger on Sunday! What's your all-time favourite Stones track?

angles.name: Stones Forever
angles.copy: Still got the moves at 83! Celebrating the incredible Mick Jagger's birthday this weekend. What a legend!

moments.title: Jennifer Lopez's 57th Birthday
moments.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez celebrates her 57th birthday today, July 24th.

angles.name: JLo Day
angles.copy: Happy 57th birthday to the incredible Jennifer Lopez! What's your go-to JLo anthem?

angles.name: Still Jenny From The Block
angles.copy: Celebrating the one and only JLo today! 57 and still absolutely slaying it. What's your favourite JLo movie or song?

moments.title: Joe Jonas Turns 37
moments.blurb: Jonas Brothers and DNCE frontman Joe Jonas celebrates his 37th birthday today, July 24th.

angles.name: Jonas Brother's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 37th birthday to Joe Jonas! What's your favourite Jonas Brothers or DNCE track?

angles.name: Pop-Rock Prince
angles.copy: Sending birthday wishes to Joe Jonas today! What's a song by him that always gets you singing?

moments.title: Harry Kane's 33rd Birthday
moments.blurb: England football captain and prolific striker Harry Kane celebrates his 33rd birthday on Tuesday, July 28th.

angles.name: England Captain's B-Day
angles.copy: Happy 33rd birthday to England captain Harry Kane on Tuesday! What's your favourite goal of his?

angles.name: Football Star
angles.copy: Celebrating England's top scorer, Harry Kane, this week! Send him your birthday wishes!

moments.title: Fernando Alonso Turns 45
moments.blurb: Two-time Formula 1 World Champion Fernando Alonso celebrates his 45th birthday on Wednesday, July 29th.

angles.name: F1 Legend's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 45th birthday to the evergreen Fernando Alonso on Wednesday! What's your favourite Alonso F1 moment?

angles.name: Still Racing Strong
angles.copy: 45 years young and still pushing the limits! Birthday wishes to F1 icon Fernando Alonso this week.

moments.title: UK Summer Weather & Drought Concerns
moments.blurb: The UK is experiencing mixed weather to end July, with some areas facing continued dry conditions and drought warnings, particularly in the south and south-east of England.

angles.name: Water Saving Tips
angles.copy: It's been a dry July for many parts of the UK. Share your best tips for saving water at home or in the garden!

angles.name: Summer Showers Needed
angles.copy: Are you hoping for some rain this weekend? Some areas of the UK really need those summer showers!

moments.title: Summer Nights at the Bandstand Returns
moments.blurb: Summer Nights at the Bandstand returns for its eleventh year at Kelvingrove Park in Glasgow, with events beginning on Monday, July 27th.

angles.name: Glasgow Gigs
angles.copy: Summer Nights at the Bandstand kicks off Monday in Glasgow! Who's excited for live music in Kelvingrove Park?

angles.name: Bandstand Vibes
angles.copy: Live music under the stars is back in Glasgow next week! Get ready for Summer Nights at the Bandstand.

moments.title: Y-Not Festival Approaching
moments.blurb: Y-Not Festival, bringing indie music and community spirit to Derbyshire's Peak District, returns from July 30th to August 2nd.

angles.name: Peak District Party
angles.copy: Y-Not Festival is just around the corner! Who's heading to Derbyshire for a weekend of indie anthems?

angles.name: Festival Lineup
angles.copy: Counting down to Y-Not! What acts are you most looking forward to seeing in the Peak District?
